---
title: "Electroglottographic data on Italian"
author:
  - Stefano Coretta
year: 2018
population: ["Verbano-Cusio-Ossola"]
languages: ["Italian"]
url: "https://github.com/stefanocoretta/coretta2018itaegg"
abstract: |
  A dataset with EGG data from 19 speakers of Italian.
---

## Variables

`speaker`

:   Speaker's ID.

`ipu`

:   Sentence ID.

`stimulus`

:   Sentence.

`sentence_ons`

:   Onset time of the sentence (s).

`sentence_off`

:   Offset time of the sentence (s).

`word_ons`

:   Onset time of the target word (s).

`word_off`

:   Offset time of the target word (s).

`v1_ons`

:   Onset time of the first vowel (s).

`c1_ons`

:   Onset time of the first consonant (s).

`v2_ons`

:   Onset time of the second vowel (s).

`voice_ons`

:   Voice onset of the first vowel (s).

`voice_off`

:   Voice offset of the first vowel (s).

`c1_rel`

:   Time of C1 release (s).

`c2_rel`

:   Time of C2 release (s).

`stimulus ID`

:   Stimulus unique ID.

`sentence`

:   Stimulus sentence frame.

`word`

:   Target word, embedded in `sentence`.

`c1`

:   First consonant of the target word.

`vowel`

:   First vowel of the target word.

`c2`

:   Second consonant of the target word.

`backness`

:   Backness of the vowel (`back`, `central`, `front`).

`height`

:   Height of the vowel (`high`, `mid-high`, `mid-low`, `low`).

`c1_place`

:   Place of articulation of C1.

`c2_place`

:   Place of articulation of C2.

`v1_duration`

:   Duration of V1 (ms).

`c2_clos_duration`

:   Closure duration of C2 (ms).

`rel_voff`

:   Time lag between C1 release and voice offset of V1 (ms).

`sent_duration`

:   Sentence duration (ms).

`speech_rate`

:   Speech rate as syllables per second

`speech_rate_c`

:   Centred speech rate calculated as syllables per second minus mean syllables per second.

`voice_duration`

:   Duration of vocal fold vibration (voicing) between C1 and C2 (`voice_off` - `voice_ons`, ms).

`vot`

:   Voice onset time of C1 (ms).

`voi_clo`

:   Duration during closure of C2 (ms).

`rel_rel`

:   Time lag between release of C1 and release of C2 (ms).

`file`

:   Sound file name.

`f0`

:   Mean fundamental frequency of V1 (Hz).

`cutoff`

:   \[FastTrack setting\].

`f11`-`f35`

:   Formant values from FastTrack for the first three formants at 5 equidistant timepoints within V1.
    `f11` = F1 at time point 1, `f21` = F2 at time point 1, and so on.

## Preview

```{r}
#| label: dat
#| message: false
load("data/coretta2018a/ita_egg.rda")
ita_egg
```
